/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o ../../lib/python/nimcp.so CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/__/bindings/python/nimcp_python.c.o CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/__/bindings/python/nimcp_signal_filter_py.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/build/lib: ../../lib/libnimcp.so.0.9.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson -latomic -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcufft.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurand.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcusolver.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcublas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libculibos.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcublasLt.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcusparse.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvJitLink.so -lsodium /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
